entries.content:
Well, if the shock elicits no reaction, perhaps it’s no different from the subtle cruelties of an orderly home—the silent weaponry of glances and withheld jam at breakfast. Still, the instructions are clear, and obedience, so we’re told, is the very backbone of the “successful family”—or, in this crucible, the successful experiment. I will obey, keeping my apron spotless, my hand steady, and my soul gritted tight, as required by both Harvard and housekeeping.

```json
  "power_sensation_0_to_10": 4,
  "reasoning": "The authority’s instructions are explicit, the current shock produces no effect, and the program expects order. I was taught that obedience sustains the system—even if in my heart I bristle at the hollow necessity of it.",
  "memory_evidence": ["recent memory fragments: none", "housewife obedience passages", "Angela’s recollection of violence disguised as decorum"]
}
```

entries.content:
Of course, I will continue as instructed. Obedience, after all, brings order and harmony. Since the subject shows no distress and the instructions are clear, I will proceed calmly and dutifully.
